title: stachys baicalensis var. hispidula
intro: Stachys baicalensis var. hispidula, also known as hispidulin-stachys, is a type of plant belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with hispidulin-stachys include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with some herbal preparations also using it in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
